Description: Document whether `src/utils/lib/parse-torrent-title` is treated as internal, vendored, or replaceable dependency in v2.
Definition of Done: Strategy doc defines ownership, upgrade policy, and test expectations.
Rollback Criteria: If strategy remains unclear, freeze internal changes and allow bugfix-only patches.

Title: Refactor parse-torrent-title access via wrapper
Description: Create a single wrapper module for parse-torrent-title usage and migrate all direct imports to it.
Definition of Done: All app code imports parser through wrapper and integration tests pass.
Rollback Criteria: If wrapper migration causes regressions, temporarily permit mixed import mode.

Title: Stabilize parse-torrent-title regression suite
Description: Classify and run parser tests relevant to production paths; mark noisy tests and document rationale.
Definition of Done: Parser regression suite has clear pass criteria for v2 releases.
Rollback Criteria: If suite is unstable, gate only on high-value subset and expand later.

Title: Document parser upgrade and sync process
Description: Add contributor guide for updating parser subtree and validating compatibility.
Definition of Done: Guide includes step-by-step update and rollback process.
Rollback Criteria: If guide is not followed in trial run, revise with clearer commands.

Title: M5 gate - contributor readiness complete
Description: Close only when docs/templates/checklists/ADRs are complete and usable.
Definition of Done: Contributor workflow is documented and validated.
Rollback Criteria: Keep gate open until onboarding dry-run passes.

Title: Global rollback drill per milestone
Description: Run one rollback simulation per milestone and record evidence.
Definition of Done: Each milestone includes successful rollback proof.
Rollback Criteria: Freeze promotion if any rollback drill fails.
